blocks.text: Real Madrid stuns Atlético in five-goal derby thriller
Madrid trail Barcelona by just 4 points after Sunday's 3-2 win. With Los Blancos refusing to yield, La Liga's title race is very much alive heading into the final stretch.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Aramco Japanese GP at Suzuka — Russell leads Antonelli by just 4pts in tightest F1 fight in years
